–1. A name of Esau, possibly on account of his being covered with 
red hairGe 25:25,30;36:1,8,19
–2. A name of the land occupied by the descendants of Esau
  .It extended from the Elanitic Gulf to the Red Sea, and was also called IDUMEAGe 32:3;36:16,17,21;Jer 40:11
  .Noted for its wise menOb 1:8
  .Sins ofOb 1:10-14
  .Prophecies concerningJer 25:21-23;27:1-11;Da 11:41
  .SeeEDOMITES
  .FIGURATIVE of the foes of ZionIsa 63:1
  .Wilderness of2Ki 3:8
